description: Sophomore in spring, exploring options. Three diverse colleges on the list.
business_rationale: Validates the mid-funnel experience: sophomores who are no longer brand-new but not yet under application pressure. The roadmap should focus on exploration and academic preparation rather than deadline-driven tasks. Catches regressions where the system treats early-stage users like seniors.
tests: Resolver picks sophomore_spring from graduation_year=2028 + spring
3 diverse colleges (one UC) added without merge errors
Roadmap content is appropriate for mid-cycle exploration (not application crunch)
